title: Prism Bloom Exercise
subtitle: Outdoor exercise community website with events, routes, social links, and calendar access
description: A public website for Prism Bloom Exercise, a free outdoor exercise community focused on helping people find welcoming activities, routes, and community links in one place.

The site includes a main information page, an events page, a routes page, and a social/calendar links page so visitors can learn about the group, find offered activities, follow routes on their own, and connect through Discord, social media, and calendars.

Event and route data are kept current through a Google Apps Script process that builds and saves JSON data once per day at midnight, allowing the website to stay updated without manually editing each listing.
features: Main page with about, our story, and disclaimer sections
Events page listing offered outdoor activities
Routes page for self-guided route viewing and following
Event and route filtering by tags and distance
Daily JSON refresh from Google Apps Script at midnight
Social media links and calendar links in one dedicated page
Lightweight static website structure hosted through GitHub Pages
statusDetails: Events and routes are loaded from generated JSON data
Google Apps Script refresh process keeps listing data up to date once per day
Filtering support is included for tags and distance
Community links and calendars are available from the links page
Content, routes, and event offerings are expected to continue expanding

howItWorks: The website is organized into four main pages: the main information page, events, routes, and social/calendar links.
The events page displays available Prism Bloom Exercise activities and allows visitors to filter by tags and distance.
The routes page displays route options so visitors can follow routes on their own, with filtering by tags and distance.
A Google Apps Script builds and saves updated JSON data once per day at midnight, which the website then retrieves for current event and route listings.
apiStructure: Event and route listings are stored as generated JSON files.
The JSON files are produced by Google Apps Script from the project data source.
The static website reads the generated JSON instead of requiring a traditional backend server.

progressNotes: Created a public web presence for Prism Bloom Exercise.
Structured the site around clear visitor needs: learning about the community, finding events, viewing routes, and accessing links.
Connected the events and routes pages to JSON data generated by Google Apps Script.
Set the data workflow to rebuild and save updated JSON once per day at midnight.
Added filtering support so visitors can narrow events and routes by tags and distance.
Added social media and calendar link access through a dedicated page.
Kept Discord as the primary community and event hub while supporting additional social and calendar access.
Continuing to refine the website content, route listings, event listings, and community connection points.
Future updates may expand route details, event coverage, and supporting documentation.
